title: The Agentic AI Engineer - Benedikt Sanftl, Mutagent
summary: The Agentic AI Engineer is a multi-agent system steered by an orchestrator that implements an eval-driven development loop for building AI agents. The system combines specification, building, evaluation, diagnosis, monitoring, and optimization of AI agents. Benedikt Sanftl from Mutagent presented this concept with a live agent demo.
writeup: This talk from Benedikt Sanftl of Mutagent presents the Agentic AI Engineer, a multi-agent system in which an orchestrator coordinates the work of building other AI agents through an eval-driven development loop. The system spans the full lifecycle: specification, building, evaluation, diagnosis, monitoring, and optimization. The framing matters because it treats agent construction as a structured, spec-driven process rather than ad hoc prompting, with evaluation feedback steering each iteration. The session includes a live agent demo.
